# DependsiT Markdown Studio

> A free, open-source Markdown editor and document converter that runs entirely in your browser.

- [Source Code (GitHub)](https://github.com/Depends-iT/dependsit-markdown-studio)
- [Report an Issue](https://github.com/Depends-iT/dependsit-markdown-studio/issues)
- [MIT License](https://github.com/Depends-iT/dependsit-markdown-studio/blob/main/LICENSE)

## Features

- Split-pane Markdown editor with live preview
- Import: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, CSV, HTML, JSON, XML, EPUB, RTF
- Export: Markdown, PDF, DOCX, HTML, plain text
- GFM tables, KaTeX math, Mermaid diagrams
- Tabbed workspace with IndexedDB persistence
- Find and replace with regex support
- Document statistics with readability scoring
- Command palette (Ctrl+K)
- Custom user snippets
- Focus / zen mode
- Light, sepia, and dark themes
- Word count goal tracking
- Print support
- 100% client-side — your files never leave your device
